title: Life Crystal Sword
description: This resource pack replaces a netherite sword with a crystal sword if you rename it “crystal sword” in the anvil
body:
![Sword in right hand](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/871e73df3d9e4cada6c4cd8ecd667baadcf92a0c.png)This resource pack replaces a netherite sword with a crystal sword if you rename it “crystal sword” in the anvil

I'm also going to make a mod that will add a lot of new ores and weapons to the game and one of them will be this sword :)
